name: Conway Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Conway Recreation Center in Center Conway, NH! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Davis Park
description: Near the covered bridge, behind the small parking lot at Davis Park.  Paddle holder on the outside of the courts.

name: Foss Field Pickleball Courts
description: Two outdoor dedicated pickleball courts plus two tennis courts with permanent lines that can be used as an additional four pickleball courts.

name: Johnny Eastman Park - Public Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Johnny Eastman Park - Public Pickleball Courts in Conway, NH! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Kraine Meadow Park
description: MRD’s Pickleball Program is open to ALL levels of play. Comfortable clothing is recommended & sneakers are required.
open_play_schedule: Pre-registration is required & space is limited. Sign up online or in the Rec office. Call MRD for more info 603-476-8868.
fees: Members only — $3/day for residents, $5/day for non-residents

name: McSheffrey’s Up North-The Club
description: McSheffrey’s Up North-The Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bartlett, NH. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Open Play 9am to noon and 4 to 6 pm  7 days a week
fees: Fee required — $10 for guest of MWVPBG member

name: North Conway Community Center
description: North Conway Community Center is a place to play pickleball in North Conway, NH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Tuftonboro Central School
description: Tuftonboro Central School is a place to play pickleball in Center Tuftonboro, NH. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: White Mountain Hotel and Resort
description: White Mountain Hotel and Resort is a place to play pickleball in North Conway, NH. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms.
